level_signals: 5+ years building products within or deeply integrated with paid social advertising platforms
Demonstrated principal behavior: set direction across teams, resolve ambiguity without escalation
Comp range $194,250–$235,000 base, consistent with Principal IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years in product management, with 5+ years building products within or deeply integrated with paid social advertising platforms  at a technology company, ad-tech firm, social platform, or large-scale DTC brand
5+ years building products within or deeply integrated with paid social advertising platforms  at a technology company, ad-tech firm, social platform, or large-scale DTC brand

Hands-on depth across multiple paid social platforms and their APIs: Meta (Marketing API, CAPI, Advantage+, Creator Marketplace), TikTok (Ads API, Events API, Creator Marketplace), YouTube (Ads API, Brand Connect), and at least one of Pinterest, Snapchat, or LinkedIn
Track record of building creative intelligence products, creative scoring, DCO, or multivariate testing infrastructure that demonstrably improved performance at scale
Deep measurement expertise: you've personally designed and shipped MMM, MTA, or incrementality frameworks, not just consumed their outputs
Experience in influencer or creator product development: discovery tooling, workflow automation, or performance attribution for creator-driven paid and organic content

Strong technical fluency: you lead cross-functional squads with engineers, data scientists, and analysts as peer collaborators  you can write a technical spec, review a model card, and challenge architectural decisions
Demonstrated principal behavior: you set direction across teams, resolve ambiguity without escalation, drive alignment at senior levels, and communicate at publication quality

explicitly_excluded: This is a product role, not a marketing one.

scope.surface: Next-generation Paid Social platform: creative intelligence, signal strategy, measurement + incrementality, budget allocation and execution automation spanning Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, Snapchat, and emerging channels
scope.business_model: B2C subscription (meal-kit), global DTC, growth marketing platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Paid social spend efficiency (hundreds of millions in budget)
core_responsibilities: Own a closed-loop growth system, including both the platform and the team practices that surround it
Build systems that predict, score, and generate high-performing creative (DCO across Meta, TikTok, YouTube)
Define and evolve platform signals (CAPI, Events APIs, modeled conversions) and shift optimization toward downstream value
Move from manual planning to model-driven budget allocation; integrate with platform bidding systems (Advantage+, Smart+)
Own incrementality, MMM, and causal measurement frameworks and translate model outputs into actionable decisions
Partner with VP Marketing, Data Science, and Engineering; resolve platform vs. internal optimization tradeoffs
Set the standard for product thinking, decision frameworks, and experimentation rigor

compensation.equity_form: company equity plan based on role

green_flags: Very specific product surface and ownership (closed-loop growth system, not vague marketing role)
Role explicitly distinguishes itself as product, not marketing — clear scope clarity
Generous benefits: $0 health options, 16-week parental leave, sabbatical PTO
High-scale environment with hundreds of millions in paid social spend — strong learning opportunity
red_flags: Location limited to New York; no remote eligibility mentioned — eliminates distributed candidates
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not addressed
10+ years minimum is a hard bar that narrows the candidate pool significantly
No team size or reporting structure disclosed
Influencer/creator product experience listed as a must-have but reads more like a nice-to-have in context — slight ambiguity
